acceptance_criteria.text: POST /api/bookmarks saves a URL with auto-extracted title and optional tags
GET /api/bookmarks returns all bookmarks sorted newest first
SQLite persistence at playground/data/bookmarks.db with correct schema
React SPA served at localhost:3000 with clean, styled UI
URL input + tag input + Save button, search bar with real-time filtering
Tag pills on bookmarks, clickable to filter by tag
Each bookmark shows title (linked), tags, date, delete button
Empty state, loading spinner, error messages for invalid/duplicate URLs
Duplicate URLs rejected, invalid URLs auto-prepend https://, long titles truncated
